positive: Stylized minimalist woodland scene: A crescent moon hangs above a tranquil forest clearing. The main subject is a cluster of stylized bioluminescent mushrooms and intricate ferns that emit a soft, ethereal glow. The composition should be balanced and symmetrical, featuring deep emerald greens, midnight blues, and touches of neon turquoise and pale gold highlights. Use clean, sharp vector-art aesthetics mixed with soft, watercolor washes for depth. Emphasize high contrast and defined silhouettes against a deep indigo background. Perfect for repeat pattern tiling. Flat lay, digital artwork, perfect for apparel printing.
